subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Thy call hath been hearkened unto, and thy book hath attained acceptance at the Throne. Render thou thanks unto thy Lord for this bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله ندایت اصغا شد و کتابت لدی العرش فائز گشت ان اشکری ربک بهذا الفضل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God
